title: The Mana Influx (Royal Road)
tagline: Serial chapters updated weekly as Kiwi Parsons explores new mana mutations.
description: The Royal Road edition of The Mana Influx features live chapters, reader polls, and author commentary as Bronwic’s journey continues into Book Six: Tuuvok Corruption. Chapter 282 marks the start of the newest arc, and backers can follow experimental side stories as they release.
updateSchedule: Weekly on Royal Road (subject to change during launch weeks)
highlights: Chapters 1–282 available free with author notes.
Stub notices for Kindle Unlimited exclusives and Omnibus releases.
Reader polls guide side quests and bonus interludes.
